titleStmt.title: SII 38.285A: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 285A. (A.R. No. 285A of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, same temple.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription containing two pieces, is found engraved below the previous inscription. It is registered in the Annual report as 284.

It contains two parts. The first part contains a portion of the meykīrtti of the Chōḷa ruler Kulōttuṅga, Pugaḻsūḻnda. The second part seems to refer to a land grant for conducting contain rituals at the temple. It appears that the said land was sold to the temple both by the mahāsabhai and veḷḷāḷar of the village. The madhyastha of the village figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcū ṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyiṟ poṉnemiyaḷavu
n=taṉnemi naṭappa viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu vikkiramat
toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākattu vāki A
yil muḷai kon=taḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭā
ttik kittiyai niṟutti vaṭavaraca vākaicūṭi tenṟicain=ta paru kamalap pūmakaḷ puṇara
poṉṉiyāṭai naṉṉilappāvai taṉnimaiyun=tiraṉtu paṉinir tirumaṇimakuṭam

laip peṟātomākavum Innilañ cuṭa
ṟaṉṟavane pokkaṟu kaṭavanākavum kalliluñcempilu
ḷappeṟuvatākavum Ittirunāḷaikku tirukkāvaṇamum Iṭṭu
ṭiccu śrīpātatāṅki cevikka kaṭavomākavum Innilattukku
ṇaintār tiruvāṇaimaṟuttār paṭṭa deṇṭa paṭak kaṭavarākavum Itu ka
tār keṅkaiiṭaik kumariiṭaic ceytār ceyta pā
vattai n kuṭu kovukkuccolli Ittaṅkaḻaiñcu
poṉmaṉṟap peṟuvatākavum Ippaṭikku cammatittu
viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyomum veḷ
ḷāḷaromum Ivarkaḷ paṇikka paṇiyāleḻutine maddhyasthan
Iv tiruviṇṇakarniṉṟānen Ive Eṉneḻuttu Ittaṉ
mañ ceytān kalinampi ceripaḷḷi koṅkataṇṭan civakkoḻu
ntuk kaṇṇappaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.285A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
